SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.ctl.dsl.gen

Interface CtlDslListener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
CtlDslBaseListener
public interface CtlDslListener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
